common.loginGuestWarn: Guest accounts are temporary and data may be lost if you clear your browser cache.
common.rulesSub: These rules ensure PersonaChat remains a creative, safe, and innovative space for everyone.
common.rulesFooter: By continuing to use PersonaChat, you agree to these standards.
common.feedbackNote: Submissions are moderated by AI. Inappropriate content will be rejected.
common.placeholderFeedback: Please describe the issue or your suggestion in detail...
common.aiModerating: AI is checking your content for safety...
common.quotaWarnHome: Firestore limit reached. You can still chat and manage local characters, but community sync is limited.
common.noRecentChatsSub: Start a conversation with a character to see it here.
common.noPublicCharacters: There aren't any public characters yet.
common.noPersonasYet: You haven't created any characters yet.
common.reportCharDesc: Please describe the issue with this character. Our moderators will review it.
common.deleteChatDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this chat history? This action cannot be undone.
common.createGroupChatSub: Select characters to start a conversation.
common.noRecentCharacters: No recent characters found. Try searching for public ones!
common.groupChatNote: You can add as many characters as you want to a group chat.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.enabledBody: You will now receive live updates from the app.

notifications.liveDesc: Receive real-time alerts on your Windows or Android device for new messages, followers, and achievements.
notifications.blockedDesc: Notifications are currently blocked by your browser. Please clear your site permissions or check your browser settings to re-enable them.

community.title: Community
community.noPosts: No posts yet. Start the conversation!
community.endOfFeed: You've reached the end of the community feed.
community.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first!
community.reportPlaceholder: Why are you reporting this post? (e.g. Spam, Harassment, Inappropriate content...)
community.reportSuccess: Report submitted successfully. Thank you for helping keep our community safe!

stats.dashboardSub: Overview of the community and your activity
stats.xpNote: Keep interacting with characters and the community to earn XP and level up!
stats.quotaLimitDesc: The website has reached its daily data limit for the free tier. Statistics are temporarily unavailable. Please check back tomorrow!

creator.title: Creator Dashboard
creator.subtitle: Manage your characters and track your popularity.

messages.title: Messages
messages.startPrompt: Send a message to start the chat!
messages.windowSub: Select a conversation from the list or visit a user's profile to start a new chat.

chat.localModeDesc: Local Mode: Firestore limit reached. Messages are saved locally.

personas.title: My Personas
personas.name: Name
personas.personalityPlaceholder: E.g. Witty, sarcastic, highly intelligent, loves coffee...

profile.title: Profile
profile.hubSub: View detailed analytics and reviews for your characters.
profile.avatarUploadHint: Click to upload a profile picture

rules.zeroToleranceDesc: Hate speech or harassment results in immediate bans.
rules.privacyDesc: Private characters are never shared with anyone.
rules.freedomDesc: We prioritize expression within safety bounds.
rules.conductDesc: How we interact as a community.
rules.respectDesc: Treat every user and AI personality with basic human dignity. Harassment, hate speech, and bullying are strictly prohibited.
rules.noToxicDesc: Prohibited content includes extremist ideologies, illegal activities, and glorification of self-harm.
rules.ageDesc: This platform is intended for users 13+. Keep public characters and community posts broadly appropriate.
rules.creationDesc: Standards for AI characters and personas.
rules.safetyDesc: Public characters must NOT encourage violence, non-consensual sexual content, or dangerous illegal behaviors.
rules.noImpersonationDesc: Do not create characters to maliciously impersonate real living figures for fraud or targeted harassment.
rules.ipDesc: Respect the copyrights of artists and authors. AI prompts should not be used to bypass proprietary protections.
rules.spamDesc: No mass-creation of accounts or characters to manipulate ratings, level systems, or community rankings.
rules.integrityDesc: Do not attempt to scrape private database information or exploit LLM vulnerabilities for malicious extraction.
rules.englishDesc: While multi-lingual chat is supported, public character descriptions and community comments must be in English for moderation.
rules.footerSub: We reserve the right to remove any content that violates these principles.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Personalize your chat experience and interface

notifications.liveDesc: Receive instant notifications when bots message you or when you gain new followers.
notifications.blockedDesc: Notifications are blocked by your browser settings. Please enable them in your browser to receive alerts.

settings.previewChat2: This is how your messages and characters will look with the current settings. The theme color affects buttons, icons, and highlights.
settings.previewChat3: Hey! How do I look with these new settings?
settings.previewChat4: You look amazing! The {{color}} theme really suits the {{font}} typography.
